checks.finding: tasks.md references only AC-001 through AC-016, and every referenced identifier exists in acceptance-tests.md.
Every Blockers field in T-001 through T-006 is either literal None or a comma-separated list of valid T-NNN identifiers; blockers_format_valid is true.
REQ-001 through REQ-017 from requirements.md each appear in at least one Requirements field in tasks.md.
AC-001 through AC-016 from acceptance-tests.md are each referenced by at least one task Requirements field.
Every task T-001 through T-006 references at least one REQ-NNN identifier in its Requirements field.
No task title is test/spec/verify-oriented and no task scope is exclusively test-file work; all included verification work remains attached to requirement-bearing implementation tasks.
In round 3, every task T-001 through T-006 has Approval: Draft and Status: Planned; no task is Approved and all statuses are allowed.
T-001 through T-003 pair medium with acceptance-first, T-004 and T-005 pair high with tdd, and T-006 pairs low with test-after; precheck workflow_match_precheck is PASS.
Primary AC claims are disjoint across T-001 through T-006: AC-001–AC-005, AC-007–AC-008, AC-006/AC-009/AC-010, AC-011–AC-013, AC-015–AC-016, and AC-014 respectively.
Every blocker reference resolves to one of dependency-graph.json nodes T-001 through T-006.
BLOCKERS-FORMAT passed, and the dependency-graph.json edges form an acyclic order terminating at dependency-free T-001 and T-004.

Each task has one coherent concern: layer artifacts, cross-layer indexes, interview guidance, selected-feature validation, review-gate binding with directly tied approval regression evidence, or release metadata.

Every task T-001 through T-006 names inspectable tests, exit results, diagnostics, hashes, reports, or exact verification-log artifacts; each non-documentation-only task includes concrete command-result or evidence-artifact criteria.
traceability.md Task Mapping contains T-001 through T-006, and all requirement identifiers listed in traceability.md are defined as REQ-001 through REQ-017 in requirements.md.
